three_sided_box_count: How many boxes currently have exactly three drawn sides?
Count the boxes that have exactly three sides already drawn.
How many box cells are one edge away from being completed?
Find the number of boxes with exactly three visible sides drawn.
How many boxes on the board have three drawn boundary edges?
completable_box_label: Which labeled box can be completed by drawing one missing side?
Choose the labeled box that can be completed in one move.
Which option box can be claimed by adding one side?
Find the box that has only one side missing.
Which labeled cell can be completed next?
owned_box_count: How many boxes are marked with player {target_owner}?
Count the boxes owned by player {target_owner}.
How many completed boxes show a {target_owner} mark?
Find the number of box cells marked {target_owner}.
How many boxes on the board belong to player {target_owner}?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_single_board: a dots-and-boxes grid with some edges already drawn
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_three_sided_box_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of full-cell bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every box with exactly three drawn sides
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_three_sided_box_count: set "answer" to the number of boxes with exactly three drawn sides
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_completable_box_label: set "annotation" to the full-cell bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] of the selected labeled box
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_completable_box_label: set "answer" to the option letter, one of A, B, C, D, E, or F
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_owned_box_count: set "annotation" to a JSON array of full-cell bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every box marked with player {target_owner}
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_owned_box_count: set "answer" to the number of boxes marked with player {target_owner}
